title: Vanilla Vibes
description: Modpack that gives vanilla vibes personally to me
body:
## The modpack brings some changes to gameplay in a way that still feels vanilla.
**Here's what i mean: Minecraft vanilla vibes comes out of way you play the game. Playing minecraft you always figuring out things by yourself, carefully exploring objects around you. Modpack aims to improve minecraft in some areas of the game while keeping that vibe**

## Here're some examples
- **Mod "Supplementaries" brings a lot of new things to the game like ropes from Terraria which will add new way to navigate while mining in caves, and new mechanics to explore which don't go 30mil blocks away from vanilla**
- **Mod "Fog Looks Good Now " making the fog look like straight from alpha versions which gives that feel of someone watching you**
- **Mod "Better Combat" brings improved combat system to the game. If you don't like it you always can turn it off**
- **Mod "Camera Overhaul" makes your camera tilt a bit whenever you move based on your momentum. If you don't like it you CAN turn it off**
- **Mod "FastMove" adds some parkour movements which isn't really vanilla yet it funny. Remembe, if you don't like it you CAN turn it off**
- **Mod "Ambient Sounds" brings to us more ambience when we walking in our world**
- **Mods "Dynamic Music" and "Endless Music" will make you hear proper music for every moment of your gameplay**
- **Mod "Axiom" is helpful for creative builders. Axiom is something that i'v always wanted for minecraft builders, a pro-tool**
- **RP "Fresh Animations" brings us cinimatic-styled animations fot the mobs which is totally needed in minecraft. If you'll compare Warden and Polar Bear animations you'll get it**
- **RP "Trailers Vision" or "Bare Bones" changes minecraft textures so they look like in the cinematic. I prefer using second for gameplay and first one for screenshots/renders**

**That's not all of the changes cuz there're much more things to explore yourself, miners!**

**It's based on "Fabulously Optimized" by robotkoer so it's pretty damn fast**

- **Used resources :**
  - Mod "Chimes" by BlewberryPie taken from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chimes/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
  - Mod "Hotbar Switcher" taken from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hotbar-switcher/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
  - RP "Fresh Animations" taken from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fresh-animations/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
  - RP "Bare Bones - Flux Enhanced Addon" taken from [here](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-flux-enhanced-addon/files)
  - RP "Trailers Vision" taken from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/trailers-vision/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
  - RP "Bare Bones Visuality Addon" taken from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/bare-bones-visuality-addon/files?page=1&pageSize=20)
  - Shader "BSL" taken from [here](https://bitslablab.com/bslshaders/)
  - RP "Fresh Player" by bozoxo2 taken from [here](https://discord.com/channels/950942125225283634/950942125745381390/1172086972148371466)
